title: Can I add my bank account number for my spouse’s Scripbox account?
meta_description: No, the investor in whose name the Scripbox account is created, must be one of the holders of the bank account.

title: How to add a bank account on Scripbox?
meta_description: You can add your bank account on Scripbox after successfully completing your KYC verification and FATCA declaration.

title: My bank account was rejected or not verified. What should I do?
meta_description: Bank account verification usually gets rejected due to name mismatch between your bank account and your profile on Scripbox. Or it is also possible that you may have entered an incorrect bank account number.

title: Are there any charges for adding my bank account to Scripbox?
meta_description: Bank account verification usually gets rejected due to name mismatch between your bank account and your profile on Scripbox. Or it is also possible that you may have entered an incorrect bank account number.

title: What FATCA-related information will you collect?
meta_description:
We are required to collect the following information from you:
For Resident Indians:

Country of birth ,Source of income ( eg – salary/business etc.)

title: My KYC is not registered, can you help me to get my KYC registered for Mutual funds?
meta_description: KYC verification is an instantaneous process, if there is no mismatch in your KYC data. In case of data mismatch, we ask for a few additional details to verify your KYC.

title: What should I do if my KYC gets rejected?
meta_description: You can re-apply for KYC verification with valid documents. To know more, you can chat with us, call us at 1800-102-1265 or email us at help@scripbox.com.

title: I’m already a Mutual Fund investor. Do I need to do KYC again?
meta_description: We will only verify your KYC status from the central repository to ensure that you are KYC compliant. It is a one time activity and takes only a few minutes

title: Why is KYC required to invest in Mutual Funds and How is it done?
meta_description: Some of these requirements are specified by SEBI (Securities and Exchange Board of India). Others have been included by us in order to simplify the registration process for the majority of investors.

title: Is a nominee mandatory?
meta_description: Yes, nominee declaration is mandatory. If you wish not to add a nominee, you can select “Don’t want to add nominee” in the registration process.

title: How can I set up my Scripbox investment account?
meta_description: Get started by verifying your email with an OTP, Enter your PAN and Date of Birth, Enter a few details required by compliance related to your income,  bank account an

title: What documents will I need to set up my investment account?
meta_description: All you need to set up your Scripbox investment account is your PAN and your bank account details.

title: Can NRIs Open a Mutual Funds Investment Account with Scripbox?
meta_description: Yes, NRI customers are supported on Scripbox. You can open your investment account and start investing in mutual funds.

title: Can I create a Scripbox account that is jointly held by two or more persons?
meta_description: No, Scripbox does not support joint accounts at this time. You can invest for your family members by adding them as investors.

title: I have forgotten my password. How can I reset it?
meta_description: On the login screen, click forgot password and enter your registered mobile number or email. An OTP will be sent to you to confirm your identity to change your password.

title: Can I open multiple accounts with the same mobile number?
meta_description: Yes, you can open multiple accounts with the same mobile number.

title: How can I disable app lock?
meta_description: Yes, you can disable app lock on your device at any time, but it is not recommended for security reasons.

title: What should I do if I suspect my account has been hacked?
meta_description: Check your account settings and transactions for any suspicious activity, and contact us for assistance.

title: What’s new at Scripbox?
meta_description: We have done a complete overhaul and one can expect smoother journeys, easier navigation, simpler interface, and more powerful ways to organise your wealth.

title: What new features have you added to Scripbox?
meta_description: Set your growth strategy based on your risk profile and get fund recommendations tailored to build the perfect portfolio for you.

title: Why are the website and app experience different?
meta_description: We are working on enhancing your experience on larger screens. While we make these improvements, our latest app is designed to offer seamless navigation and ensure that you receive unbiased

title: Where can I find the investment journey of my plans?
meta_description:
Open the 'Wealth' tab on the Scripbox app
Select the 'Products' section
Choose 'Mutual Funds' from the available options

title: Where can I access my US stocks investments?
meta_description: To access your investments in US stocks, you can log in to your Stockal account. Please note that Scripbox does not support transactions in US stocks directly

title: How do I invest in a fund which is not recommended by Scripbox?
meta_description: To invest in the funds of your choice with Scripbox, open the Invest section and select "I want to choose on my own." From there

title: I want to update the email linked to my investments, how can I do this?
I want to update my mobile number with Scripbox, how do I do this?
meta_description: Log in to your Scripbox account. Click on Profile tab > Personal Information under profile settings. Click on Mobile number. Enter your new Mobile number. On clicking “Update”, you will be prompted to confirm if a change in mobile number link

title: I want to update the mobile number linked to my investments, how can I do this?
How do I change my password?
meta_description: Log in to your Scripbox account. Click on Profile tab > Personal Information under profile settings. Click on Change Password. Enter your existing password. Enter & re-enter the new password you want to set. Click on Update.

title: How do I set my password?
meta_description: Log in to your Scripbox account. Click on Profile tab > Personal Information under profile settings. Click on “Set Password”. Enter & re-enter your Password. Click on Set Password.

title: How do I set / update app lock?
meta_description: Log in to your Scripbox account. Click on Profile tab > Personal Information under profile settings. You can then toggle on/off for the app lock

title: How can I set app lock since my device lock is disabled?
meta_description: You can follow these steps - Go to Settings. Face or Touch ID and Passcode. Tap to turn the passcode on and activate it.

title: What is the right plan to invest in?
meta_description: When looking for the right Scripbox plan to invest in, it's important to think about your financial goals, your risk appetite, and how long you want to invest

Can I invest even if I don‘t want to invest the SIP amount recommended for me?

meta_description: Scripbox recommend you do not withdraw unless it is an emergency, since this will affect your investment plan.

title: What is the difference in the Unified portfolio and how is it better than previous goal based option?
What is a growth strategy?
meta_description: Growth strategy is an approach that helps you achieve your objectives while aligning your return expectations and portfolio fluctuations with your risk appetite.

title: What are the different growth strategies available?
meta_description: Our research team has developed four evidence-based strategies based on market behaviour across different asset classes since 1997

title: How do I select a growth strategy for my plan?
meta_description: When you invest in any Scripbox plans, we will prompt you to personalise your growth strategy. After assessing your risk profile, you will be presented with the recommended strategy

title: Can I create a custom growth strategy?
meta_description: We understand that every investor has unique preferences and goals. With Scripbox, you have the flexibility to create a custom strategy that aligns perfectly with your investment objectives

title: Can I change my growth strategy later?
meta_description: With Scripbox, you have the freedom to change your growth strategy whenever you desire. During the investment journey, on the fund recommendations screen

title: Why should I understand my Risk profile?
meta_description: Understanding your risk profile is important because it helps you align your investments with your comfort level and financial goals.

title: Can the allocation under an adopted growth strategy change from time to time?
meta_description: our research team consistently monitors the investment landscape and periodically updates the asset class constituents

title: Do you actively rebalance the portfolio based on growth strategy?
meta_description: Active rebalancing involves exiting and reinvesting based on specific objectives, such as recommendations from the Portfolio Health check or fund quality.

title: Can I choose the funds to invest in?
meta_description: you have the flexibility to customise our fund recommendations or create your own basket of funds within any plan according to your preferences

title: Does the suggested retirement amount account for my family too?
meta_description: This plan includes one’s current financial situation and post-retirement needs, including future expenses for the dependent family.

title: Are emergencies like medical expenses taken into account?
meta_description: A small part of emergency requirements is built into this plan, but not entirely. We recommend that you also save for your emergency needs as well.

title: What makes Scripbox Retire Confident different?
meta_description: Scripbox Retire Confident helps you to - Grow your retirement corpus by considering your risk appetite, current savings, tenure, etc

title: What is Scripbox Retire Confident?
meta_description: Scripbox Retire Confident is a personalized investment plan designed to ensure a worry-free retirement.

title: Can I withdraw funds anytime?
meta_description: ou can withdraw your funds at any time, except ELSS funds.ELSS funds have a 3 year lock-in period. Once your investments have completed 3 years

title: Why aren’t all my Tax Saver investments available for withdrawal?
meta_description: ELSS funds have a 3 year lock-in. Once they have completed 3 years, you’ll be able to withdraw them

title: Can I withdraw only the long-term units for a fund to save on taxes?
meta_description: you should withdraw only the long-term units for a fund, if you have them in your portfolio. To explore this option,

title: How does Scripbox pick funds when withdrawing?
meta_description: Scripbox Smart WithdrawTM algorithm is designed to optimise your tax outgo by considering a combination of long-term and short-term units

title: Can I choose funds to withdraw from?
meta_description: You can choose funds to withdraw from. You can either customise our tax-optimised fund recommendations or choose to create a withdrawal basket from scratch.

title: Can I see how much exit load and taxes I have to pay when withdrawing?
meta_description: we will compute the exit load and taxes that you’ll be incurring in your withdrawal.The final summary page, before you confirm your withdrawal

title: Why is the money credited to my bank account different from the amount I placed the withdrawal for?
meta_description: If you try to withdraw only long-term units or try to withdraw completely from a fund, the final money credited may be different from what you saw when you placed the withdrawal.

title: What is the withdrawal cut-off time?
When are the mutual fund units allotted to me?
Do I get mutual fund units on the same day when paying via Netbanking or UPI?
meta_description: When making a payment via Netbanking, you will receive units as of the next business day. On the other hand, if you choose to pay via UPI before the cutoff time

title: How much time will it take for a transaction to be processed?
What is a bank mandate? Why do you need to register one?
meta_description: A bank mandate is an authorisation you provide to your bank, allowing Scripbox to transfer funds to the mutual fund company as per your scheduled investment.

title: How to register a bank mandate via net banking?
meta_description: During the investment journey, when you reach the payment options screen for a SIP, you will be prompted to register for a bank mandate

title: Why do I get the option to register a bank mandate via a paper mandate?
meta_description: Please note that we do not support online bank mandate registration for certain banks. You can check the list of supported banks on our website to see if your bank is included.

title: Which banks are supported to register an online bank mandate?
meta_description: All major banks and NBFCs are supports bank linking via net banking in Scripbox. Here is a list of banks that supports scripbox.

title: Will I be able to cancel the registered bank mandate?
meta_description: Yes, you will  need to contact us to cancel your bank mandate registration. Our team will be happy to assist you with this.

title: Why should I register for a bank mandate?
meta_description: Registering a bank mandate eliminates the need for you to manually initiate investment transactions every month. By setting up an active bank mandate

title: What payment options do I have when scheduling a transaction?
meta_description: For one-time investments, you have the convenience of choosing between two payment options: Netbanking and UPI. However, please note that certain banks may not support these options.

title: What is Portfolio Health Review?
meta_description: The Portfolio Health review is a periodic intervention mechanism that evaluates each individual mutual fund in the portfolio.

title: What benefit will I get by taking actions on the Portfolio Health Recommendations?
meta_description: With this consolidated view, you will be able to understand the financial position and get a consolidated review without having to do mental math.

title: What will happen if I don't take actions on my portfolio recommendations?
meta_description: You might potentially have not-so-good performing mutual funds in your portfolio that are at risk and might hamper your growth or might even potentially erode your capital.

title: Portfolio review is available on other platforms? Why should I trust Scripbox's recommendations?
meta_description: Scripbox don't just review your mutual fund investments with Scripbox but also look at your external investments.

How can I import my existing Mutual Funds investment with Scripbox?
meta_description: You can easily track your mutual funds by generating a CAMS Mutual Funds CAS. Once you receive an email from CAMS with your CAS

title: Can I track my stocks on the Scripbox app?
meta_description: Yes, you can conveniently upload your NSDL CAS (Consolidated Account Statement) to the Scripbox app or link your Zerodha account, and we will import all your stocks seamlessly.

title: How can I link my Zerodha account to Scripbox?
meta_description: you can easily link your Zerodha account by logging into your Kite portal directly from the Scripbox app. Once you authorise Scripbox to access your stock investments

title: Why can't I see my Mutual Funds from the NSDL CAS in the Scripbox app?
meta_description: Please note that Scripbox currently supports the import of stocks from NSDL CAS. It's important to keep in mind that any non-stock information.

title: Can I import stocks from multiple NSDL CAS documents?
meta_description: Yes, you can upload multiple NSDL CAS to the Scripbox app and we will import all the stocks included in each of your CAS.

title: I have a Fixed Deposit that has matured, but it’s still showing as part of my Total Wealth. Why?
meta_description: For Fixed Deposits which are manually tracked on the Scripbox app, we cannot determine what happens to the money when it matures. You could reinvest it, leave it in a savings account, or use it for other purposes

title: What government-provided investment schemes and retirement funds can I track with Scripbox?
meta_description: You can track a variety of government schemes, including the National Pension Scheme, Public Provident Fund, General Provident Fund, EPF Sukanya Samridhi Yojna etc

title: How can I move my investments  from another platform to Scripbox?
What loans can I track within the Scripbox app?
meta_description: You can track a variety of loans within Scripbox, including Car Loans or Auto Loans, Home Loans, Education Loans, Consumer EMIs (like EMIs for Amazon purchases), and Business Loans.

title: Can I track the total amount I will have paid on a loan by the time it is closed?
meta_description: With Scripbox, you can easily view the total amount you will have paid by the time your loan is closed. This includes the principal amount along with the calculated interest.

title: Can I track the interest accrued on my loans in Scripbox?
meta_description: With Scripbox, you can easily access valuable information about your loan. This includes the total amount you will have paid, which comprises both the principal amount and the calculated interest

title: I have multiple loans, can I track all of them in Scripbox?
meta_description: Yes, you can track any number of existing loans on the Scripbox app. This includes car or auto loans, home loans, education loans, consumer EMIs, and business loans.

title: What types of insurance policies can I track within the Scripbox app?
meta_description: Scripbox currently supports tracking Life Insurance and EPF-Linked Insurance. This allows you to view all your insurance policies in one place.

title: How can I view my total family wealth?
meta_description: Viewing your total family wealth is easy. Just open the Wealth tab on the app for an overview that includes all your investments, loans, and insurances,

title: What steps do I need to follow to make an investment or withdrawal?
meta_description: Investing and withdrawing are easy! Just open the Wealth tab and select either "Invest" or "Withdraw." There, you'll find a list of available investment plans.

title: How do I delete investments that I have tracked from my account?
meta_description:
Open the Profile tab
Choose the investor whose investments you want to delete
Find the product you want to delete and click on it

title: My tracked wealth is not showing up on my Wealth tab. Why?
meta_description: If you're experiencing issues with your wealth values not updating as expected, try closing the app completely and reopening it.

title: How can I see my wealth distribution across various plans and products?
meta_description: The Wealth Tab gives you a clear view of how your wealth is distributed across various investment plans that you have set up.

title: How can I view the current value of a product?
meta_description:
Open the Wealth tab and navigate to the ‘Product’ section 
Choose the desired product and view the the Product dashboard.

title: How can I see the historical performance of my investments in mutual funds?
meta_description: On the Product Dashboard of Mutual Funds, you will be able to view the historical performance of your investments, including both internal and external.

title: Can I move a specific investment that I have tracked, to a plan?
meta_description: Yes, you can easily move your investments to a specific plan using the Product dashboard. Just choose the investment you want to move and select the plan where you want it to go.

title: How can I view the products an investor in my account has invested in?
meta_description: On the Investor dashboard, you can view a list of the products that the chosen investor has invested in, including both Scripbox and external investments for that investor.

title: How can I view the current value and other details of a plan?
meta_description: To easily check the current value of a specific plan, simply select the desired plan, and you will be directed to the plan dashboard. On this screen, you will find comprehensive details of the plan

title: How can I download my transaction history?
meta_description: You can download your transaction history under Profile > Statements > Transaction History.

title: How can I download my capital gains statement?
meta_description: You can download your Capital Gains statement under Profile > Statements > Capital Gains.

title: How can I download my fund holdings statement?
meta_description: You can download your fund holdings statement under Profile > Statements > Fund Holdings. Note: This statement will only contain the investments that you have with Scripbox.

title: Can I download the fund holdings statement as of a particular date in the past?
meta_description: Yes, under Profile > Statements >  Fund Holdings, you will get an option to download the statement as on a particular date.

title: How can I download my tax statement for 80C?
Where is your office? What are your business hours?
meta_description: Where to find Scripbox's office and directions to the Scripbox main office.

content:
To successfully complete the signup process, please follow these steps:
Open the Wealth tab in your account
Locate the section that indicates "Action required."
Click on that section to proceed
Follow the instructions provided to complete the signup
By following these steps, you will be able to successfully complete the signup process and gain access to the wealth management features
